test_farming_advance = {
	age = age_1_traditions
	icon = farming_icon
	requires = root_advance
	requires = agriculture_advance
	unlock_production_method = test_crop_rotation
	unlock_building = test_farm
	global_monthly_food_modifier = 0.1
	global_wheat_output_modifier = 0.2
	depth = 0
	ai_weight = { add = 5 }
}

test_craft_advance = {
	age = age_2_renaissance
	icon = craft_icon
	global_build_buildings_cost = -0.05
	global_wheat_output_modifier = -0.05
}

age_3_method_unlock = {
	age = age_3_discovery
	unlock_production_method = stone_bricks
	unlock_production_method = early_method_late_building
}

age_4_method_unlock = {
	age = age_4_reformation
	unlock_production_method = clay_bricks
	unlock_production_method = late_method_early_building
}

age_4_building_unlock = {
	age = age_4_reformation
	unlock_building = bridge_infrastructure
	unlock_building = late_workshop
}

age_3_building_unlock = {
	age = age_3_discovery
	unlock_building = early_workshop
}

specific_only_method_unlock = {
	age = age_1_traditions
	potential = { has_or_had_tag = TAG }
	unlock_production_method = gem_inlay
	global_wheat_output_modifier = 0.03
}

specific_only_building_unlock = {
	age = age_1_traditions
	potential = { has_or_had_tag = TAG }
	unlock_building = regional_workshop
}
